title: 巴黎街头故事书插画
prompt_raw: Portrait illustration in a storybook style featuring a young adult woman exploring the streets of Paris. She is laughing happily with her eyes closed, holding a coffee cup in her hand. She has long, wavy hair and wears a beret hat. The scene is set near a Parisian café in a peaceful morning atmosphere. The woman has a sweet, charming smile. Soft, dreamy mood, romantic Paris street vibe, gentle lighting, and highly detailed artwork.
